description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white with large rectangular windows and clean lines, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property features a paved driveway, a garage, and a landscaped yard with a few trees and shrubs. At the rear, there is a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture and a rectangular swimming pool, bordered by gray tiles. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some floor-to-ceiling panes and others smaller and more discrete. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between the interior and exterior.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool set in a landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and a tree near the driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the outdoor dining area, pool, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the swimming pool, large windows, and a prominent tree by the poolside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, side windows, and minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, flush door, and no visible steps or decorative columns
